user_query: Determine whether the structure at the path read from os.getenv('STRUCTURE_PATH') has piezoelectricity.
solution_code_or_process: piezoelectricity_symmetry.py, Remember to set the STRUCTURE_PATH environment variable to yourabsolutepath/deep_solver_benchmark/data_for_demonstration/structure.json and source ~/.bashrc, so the agents can load the structure given by the user query.
notes: We can also use spglib to check the symmetry of the structure. All the contents in the agent_answer_o3 folder's files are automatically generated by the agents of OpenAI o3 model. It provided a more comprehensive analysis, which takes point group 432 into account. In the solution code, since we found that this structure is centrosymmetric, we directly conclude that it has no piezoelectricity.
